blog.title: Notes on better conversations.
blog.intro: Product updates, safety notes, and the ideas shaping Nevely.
blog.latestIntro: A small journal for product news and thoughtful ways to meet online.
blog.empty: No posts yet. Check back soon.

posts.title: Welcome to Nevely
posts.excerpt: Why we’re building a calmer, interest-led way to meet someone new.
body: The best conversations often start with one small thing in common. Nevely begins there, matching people around the topics they already enjoy.
We’re shaping the experience to feel calm, clear, and easy to leave at any time. Safety tools and simple choices stay close without crowding the conversation.
This journal is where we’ll share product updates, safety notes, and the thinking behind what comes next.

support.title: How can we help?
support.intro: Find a quick answer or learn where to go when something doesn’t feel right.
support.faqIntro: The things people ask us most often.

faqs.question: Where is my guest profile saved?
faqs.answer: Your guest profile stays in this browser. If you clear your browser data or use another device, you’ll need to set it up again.

faqs.question: How many chats can I save?
faqs.answer: Free accounts can keep 2 saved chats. Premium accounts can keep up to 10.

faqs.question: What do advanced filters do?
faqs.answer: Premium filters let you choose who you’d like to meet by gender, age range, country, or territory.

faqs.question: What’s the difference between a friend request and a chat request?
faqs.answer: A friend request connects two people. A chat request is an invitation to talk from someone who is already your friend.

faqs.question: What should I do if someone makes me uncomfortable?
faqs.answer: Leave the chat, then use the report or block controls. Reports help us review what happened, while blocking stops that person from contacting you.

faqs.question: Can I change my age, gender, or country?
faqs.answer: These details are fixed after setup for now. Email Support if you need help with them.

support.contactBody: Tell us what happened and we’ll point you in the right direction.
support.contactNote: The mailbox is being activated. Please don’t include passwords or other sensitive information.

about.title: A simpler way to meet someone new.
about.intro: Nevely is built for spontaneous conversations that feel easy to start and worth staying for.
about.originBody: Nevely began as a new alternative to traditional online chat rooms, with one clear goal: make meeting online feel immediate, interesting, and open to everyone.
about.missionTitle: Less pressure. More to talk about.
about.missionBody: Shared topics give each match a place to begin. A pseudonymous profile takes some of the pressure out of the first hello, while you decide what to share and when to leave.
about.principlesIntro: The product stays focused on a few practical ideas.

principles.title: Conversation comes first
principles.body: Matching, messages, friends, and notifications support the conversation without crowding it.

principles.title: A real starting point
principles.body: Topics help two people begin with something they already enjoy instead of an empty screen.

principles.title: You stay in control
principles.body: Start as a guest, choose what people see, and leave, block, or report whenever you need to.

about.contactTitle: Questions, feedback, or something we should know?
about.contactBody: Reach the same Nevely support channel used across the product.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains what Nevely collects, why we need it, and the choices you have.

sections.title: Account and profile data
sections.body: If you create an account, we keep your email address, a one-way hash of your password, display name, age, gender, country, plan, and profile image reference. We never store your password as plain text.

sections.title: Chats and retention
sections.body: We store one copy of each message in the shared conversation. If neither person saves a chat, it is deleted after 30 days. A saved chat stays until it is unsaved or deleted for everyone. Guests cannot save chats.

sections.title: Account deletion
sections.body: Deleting your account removes your access and profile information. Messages already in another person’s history stay there under “Deleted user” so the conversation still makes sense.

sections.title: Safety and moderation
sections.body: A report may include account IDs, temporary connection IDs, the reason you choose, and any details you add. We also use rate limits and automated checks to help prevent abuse.

sections.title: Sessions and service providers
sections.body: We keep login sessions in PostgreSQL and use a secure, HTTP-only cookie in your browser. Our hosting and database providers may process data on our behalf to run Nevely.

sections.title: Your controls
sections.body: In Account settings, you can update your profile, review blocked users, remove saved chats, or delete your account. Contact support with privacy questions.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: You must be 18 or older to use Nevely. Be respectful. Don’t share illegal, threatening, hateful, or sexually explicit content.

sections.title: Accounts
sections.body: Keep your sign-in details safe. You’re responsible for activity on your account.

sections.title: Moderation
sections.body: We may restrict accounts or remove content to protect people or follow the law. Our team reviews reports.

sections.title: Service availability
sections.body: Nevely is still evolving, so features may change. Premium payments aren’t available yet; the current introductory price shown is $0.00.
